title: Amtech E0260 Hand Sander
features: EASY TO USE: Lightweight and easy to use, this versatile hand sander has a spring clamp for quick sandpaper change
VERSATILE: It has a 85mm x 160mm bonded foam pad to stop the sandpaper from slipping
SIZE CAPACITY: 85 mm range ideal for household and trade applications
ERGONOMIC GRIP: Comfortable to hold for better control
PLUMBING APPLICATIONS: Essential for household and trade pipework
description: Product Description Am-Tech DIY and Tool products come with a twelve month guarantee and are built for the rigors of the typical English home owner and the DIY jobs expected.
